notes: Every CLI command/subcommand in inventories/*.cli-command.json. Vars: usage (e.g. 'tool sync --all').

steps.title: Implement `{name}` command
steps.description: Implement {name} at {path}: argument parsing with helpful errors, exit codes (0 success, distinct non-zero per failure class), quiet/verbose behavior consistent with the CLI's conventions.
acceptance_criteria: exit codes documented and distinct per failure class

steps.title: Human-quality error output for `{name}`
steps.description: Every failure of {name} prints what happened, why, and the next command to try; machine-readable output (--json) stays clean on stderr/stdout separation.
acceptance_criteria: each failure mode shows actionable guidance

steps.title: End-to-end test of `{name}` against a real workspace
steps.description: Run {name} against a fixture workspace in CI: happy path plus the top failure path; assert output and exit codes.
